name: Tolbachik
eruptionHistory: The 2012-2013 flank eruption produced extensive lava flows. The 1975-1976 'Great Tolbachik Fissure Eruption' was one of the largest basaltic eruptions of the 20th century.
description: Tolbachik is a large volcanic massif consisting of two overlapping stratovolcanoes. Its effusive eruptions produce spectacular lava flows visible from space.
